response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in software craftsmanship, high-throughput systems, and recent AI tooling, his resume lacks the core domain expertise required for this role. There is no evidence of experience architecting large-scale experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement systems, which are the fundamental focus of this Principal IC6 position.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot software engineering experience (TypeScript, C++, Java, DLang) with a strong emphasis on TDD and software craftsmanship.
Proven ability to build high-throughput systems, including microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol tooling, aligning with the AI-first requirement.
concerns: Zero mentioned experience in designing or building enterprise-scale experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platforms.
Lacks a background in growth engineering, product telemetry foundations, or statistical data analysis.
While operating at a Staff level, the severe domain mismatch makes success in a specialized Principal (IC6) Growth/Experimentation role highly unlikely.
